title: Kochhar's Mohit Kundu joins Dhaval Vussonji & Associates as Partner
description: Kochhar & Co Partner Mohit Kundu has joined Dhaval Vussonji & Associates as a Partner in Real Estate practice.Kundu is a 2008 graduate of the University of Mumbai. He earned his LLM in Corporate Governance from The University of Manchester in 2009.He has extensive experience advising developers, corporates, financial institutions, investors, etc. on a diverse range of real estate transactions across India.
